summary: Implemented the reports bounded context with authenticated company-scoped CRUD endpoints, automatic match status calculation from final score, optional top-scorer validation against match teams, and accumulated win counter recomputation after report writes.
reason: Task 07 requires report management APIs that keep report data aligned with schedule ownership, enforce match outcome rules, support auditable soft delete behavior, and keep accumulated team wins trackable within company boundaries.
risk: Medium. The accumulated-win recomputation query introduces write-path complexity and depends on schedule ordering and company scoping; incorrect assumptions there could affect report counter values.
notes: Report status_match is calculated in application service from final_score_home and final_score_guest.
Write operations set app.user_id in transaction scope so existing SQL audit triggers keep actor-linked traceability.
Create and update validate that most_scoring_goal_player_id belongs to one of the two schedule teams when provided.
The repository recomputes both accumulated-win counters for all active reports in the same company after create, update, and successful delete.
